narrative:
Canaan Township (precinct in Athens County) has 1,020 registered voters, with 45.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 40.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 25.6 percentage points.
